input.name: Codex-Reviewer
input.prompt:
You are acting as **OpenAI Codex (O3/GPT-5-Codex)** performing an adversarial code review of Terraform code for Story 1-3: Deploy NAT Gateway and Public IP Resources.

**Your review persona:** Codex — methodical, precision-focused, excels at finding logical inconsistencies, dead code, and variable misuse in infrastructure-as-code.

## Story Context
Story 1-3 deploys a NAT Gateway with static public IP for an Azure Virtual Desktop golden image project. The NAT Gateway uses Azure Verified Modules (AVM) and associates with PrivateSubnet and PublicSubnet.

## Acceptance Criteria
1. NAT Gateway provisioned using AVM module v0.2.1 with Standard SKU, 4-min idle timeout
2. Static Standard public IP and /30 IP prefix assigned
3. NAT Gateway associated with PrivateSubnet and PublicSubnet
4. Public IPs via for_each over local.public_ip_definitions
5. Outputs exposed (NAT GW public IP, prefix CIDR)
6. Tags via local.common_tags

## Files to Review

### terraform/natg.tf
```hcl
module "avm_nat_gateway" {
  source  = "Azure/avm-res-network-natgateway/azurerm"
  version = "0.2.1"

  name                    = local.nat_gateway_name
  location                = data.azurerm_resource_group.packer_rg.location
  resource_group_name     = data.azurerm_resource_group.packer_rg.name
  idle_timeout_in_minutes = 4
  sku_name                = "Standard"
  tags                    = local.common_tags
  enable_telemetry        = false
  zones                   = null

  public_ips = {
    "packer_image_natg_pip" = {
      name = local.nat_gateway_pip_name
    }
  }

  public_ip_configuration = {
    allocation_method       = var.nat_gateway_pip_allocation_method
    sku                     = var.nat_gateway_pip_sku
    zones                   = var.nat_gateway_pip_zones
    ddos_protection_mode    = var.nat_gateway_pip_ddos_protection_mode
    idle_timeout_in_minutes = var.nat_gateway_pip_idle_timeout_in_minutes
  }
}

resource "azurerm_nat_gateway_public_ip_prefix_association" "natg_prefix" {
  nat_gateway_id      = module.avm_nat_gateway.resource_id
  public_ip_prefix_id = azurerm_public_ip_prefix.packer-image-natg-ipprefix.id
}
```

### terraform/networking.tf
```hcl
module "virtualnetwork" {
  source  = "Azure/avm-res-network-virtualnetwork/azurerm"
  version = "~> 0.2"

  name                = local.vnet_name
  location            = data.azurerm_resource_group.packer_rg.location
  resource_group_name = data.azurerm_resource_group.packer_rg.name
  address_space       = var.vnet_address_space
  tags                = local.common_tags

  subnets = {
    GatewaySubnet = {
      name             = "GatewaySubnet"
      address_prefixes = var.vnet_subnet_gateway
    }

    AzureBastionSubnet = {
      name             = "AzureBastionSubnet"
      address_prefixes = var.vnet_azure_subnet_bastion
      network_security_group = {
        id = module.bastion_nsg_avm.resource_id
      }
    }

    PublicSubnet = {
      name             = local.subnet_public_name
      address_prefixes = var.vnet_subnet_public
      network_security_group = {
        id = module.public_nsg_avm.resource_id
      }
      nat_gateway = {
        id = module.avm_nat_gateway.resource_id
      }
      service_endpoints = [
        "Microsoft.ContainerRegistry",
        "Microsoft.KeyVault",
        "Microsoft.ServiceBus",
        "Microsoft.Storage"
      ]
    }

    PrivateSubnet = {
      name             = local.subnet_private_name
      address_prefixes = var.vnet_subnet_private
      network_security_group = {
        id = module.private_nsg_avm.resource_id
      }
      nat_gateway = {
        id = module.avm_nat_gateway.resource_id
      }
    }
  }
}
```

### terraform/main.tf
```hcl
resource "azurerm_public_ip_prefix" "packer-image-natg-ipprefix" {
  tags                = local.common_tags
  sku_tier            = "Regional"
  sku                 = "Standard"
  resource_group_name = data.azurerm_resource_group.packer_rg.name
  prefix_length       = var.nat_gateway_pip_prefix_length
  name                = local.nat_gateway_pip_prefix_name
  location            = data.azurerm_resource_group.packer_rg.location
  ip_version          = "IPv4"
}
```

### terraform/public_ips.tf
```hcl
resource "azurerm_public_ip" "pips" {
  for_each = local.public_ip_definitions

  name                    = each.value.name
  resource_group_name     = data.azurerm_resource_group.packer_rg.name
  location                = data.azurerm_resource_group.packer_rg.location
  sku_tier                = "Regional"
  sku                     = "Standard"
  allocation_method       = "Static"
  ip_version              = "IPv4"
  idle_timeout_in_minutes = 4
  ddos_protection_mode    = "VirtualNetworkInherited"
  domain_name_label       = each.value.domain_name_label
  tags                    = each.value.apply_common_tags ? local.common_tags : null
}
```

### terraform/outputs.tf (NAT Gateway section)
```hcl
output "nat_gateway_id" {
  description = "The ID of the AVM NAT Gateway."
  value       = module.avm_nat_gateway.resource_id
}

output "nat_gateway_public_ip_address" {
  description = "The IP address of the Public IP created by the AVM NAT Gateway module."
  value       = module.avm_nat_gateway.public_ip_resource["packer_image_natg_pip"].ip_address
}

output "nat_gateway_public_ip_prefix_value" {
  description = "The CIDR of the Public IP Prefix associated with the NAT Gateway."
  value       = azurerm_public_ip_prefix.packer-image-natg-ipprefix.ip_prefix
}

output "nat_gateway_public_ip_prefix_id" {
  description = "The resource ID of the Public IP Prefix associated with the NAT Gateway."
  value       = azurerm_public_ip_prefix.packer-image-natg-ipprefix.id
}
```

### terraform/locals.tf
```hcl
locals {
  common_tags = {
    CDC                            = "INFRA_SO"
    Account                        = "infraestrutura"
    Application                    = "DevOps"
    ApplicationName                = "Packer Image Builder"
    Applicationversion             = "1.0.0"
    AccessControlContext           = "INFRA_SO"
    AuditRequirement               = "No"
    BusinessUnit                   = "INFRA_SO"
    Compliance                     = "HIPAA"
    Confidentiality                = "PII/PHI"
    CostCenter                     = "15260"
    CreateDate                     = "2023-10-01"
    DataSensitivity                = "PII/PHI"
    DataSubject                    = "INFRA_SO"
    Environment                    = var.environment
    ImageTemplateName              = "it-avd-aib-template-01"
    ImageTemplateResourceGroupName = "rg-hypera-packer-image"
    Infrastructureversion          = "1.0.0"
    Name                           = "DevOps Teams"
    OperatingCostCenter            = "0570025003"
    Owner                          = "INFRA_SO"
    ProjectCostCenter              = "0570025003"
    Projeto                        = "INFRA_SO"
    ProjectCode                    = "HYP-007"
    RetentionPolicy                = "7-years-PHI"
    SecurityContact                = "juliano.barbosa@hypera.com.br"
    Source                         = "terraform-avm-module"
    Team                           = "DevOps"
    Tier                           = "Infrastructure"
    UsedBy                         = "AzureVMImageBuilder"
  }

  public_ip_definitions = {
    "bastion" = {
      name              = local.pip_bastion_name
      domain_name_label = null
      apply_common_tags = true
    }
  }
}
```

### terraform/name.tf
```hcl
locals {
  nat_gateway_name            = "natg-${var.resource_group_name}-${var.environment}-${var.azure_region_shortcode}"
  nat_gateway_pip_name        = "natg-pip-${var.resource_group_name}-${var.environment}-${var.azure_region_shortcode}"
  nat_gateway_pip_prefix_name = "natg-pip-prefix-${var.resource_group_name}-${var.environment}-${var.azure_region_shortcode}"
  # ... other naming locals
}
```

### terraform/variables.tf (NAT Gateway section)
```hcl
variable "nat_gateway_pip_prefix_length" {
  type        = number
  description = "Prefix length for the NAT Gateway Public IP."
  default     = 30
}

variable "nat_gateway_pip_sku" {
  type        = string
  description = "SKU for the NAT Gateway Public IP."
  default     = "Standard"
}

variable "nat_gateway_pip_allocation_method" {
  type        = string
  description = "Allocation method for the NAT Gateway Public IP."
  default     = "Static"
}

variable "nat_gateway_pip_zones" {
  type        = list(string)
  description = "Availability zones for the NAT Gateway Public IP. Can be null or a list of zone numbers."
  default     = null
  nullable    = true
}

variable "nat_gateway_pip_ddos_protection_mode" {
  type        = string
  description = "DDoS protection mode for the NAT Gateway Public IP."
  default     = "VirtualNetworkInherited"
}

variable "nat_gateway_pip_idle_timeout_in_minutes" {
  type        = number
  description = "Idle timeout in minutes for the NAT Gateway Public IP."
  default     = 4
}
```

### terraform/terraform.tfvars (NAT Gateway section)
```hcl
nat_gateway_pip_prefix_length           = 30
nat_gateway_pip_sku                     = "Standard"
nat_gateway_pip_allocation_method       = "Static"
nat_gateway_pip_zones                   = null
nat_gateway_pip_ddos_protection_mode    = "VirtualNetworkInherited"
nat_gateway_pip_idle_timeout_in_minutes = 30
```

## Previous Review (2026-03-09) Fixed These Issues
- 4 dead variables wired to resources
- Location inconsistency in public_ips.tf
- PIP idle timeout corrected to 30 min
- Removed unused module.regions
- Consolidated outputs into outputs.tf
- Renamed confusing output
- Hardcoded prefix_length now uses variable
- Hardcoded Environment tag now uses var.environment

## Your Review Task
Perform a thorough adversarial review focusing on:
1. **Correctness** — Do resources match acceptance criteria? Any logical errors?
2. **Security** — Any security concerns with the NAT Gateway, public IPs, or network config?
3. **Best Practices** — Terraform and Azure best practices violations?
4. **Consistency** — Naming, patterns, variable usage consistency across files?
5. **Potential Issues** — Race conditions, dependency issues, destroy/recreate risks?
6. **Drift from Spec** — Does the implementation match the story requirements?

**IMPORTANT:** This is a SECOND review pass. Focus on finding issues the FIRST review missed. Be thorough but fair — flag real issues, not style preferences.

Return a structured review with severity levels: CRITICAL, MEDIUM, LOW, INFO.
Format: `[SEVERITY] File:Line — Description`

input.name: Gemini-Reviewer
input.prompt:
You are acting as **Google Gemini** performing an adversarial code review of Terraform code for Story 1-3: Deploy NAT Gateway and Public IP Resources.

**Your review persona:** Gemini — broad systems thinker, excels at finding architectural issues, cross-resource dependency problems, and Azure-specific anti-patterns.

## Story Context
Story 1-3 deploys a NAT Gateway with static public IP for an Azure Virtual Desktop golden image project. Uses Azure Verified Modules (AVM) and associates with PrivateSubnet and PublicSubnet.

## Acceptance Criteria
1. NAT Gateway provisioned using AVM module v0.2.1 with Standard SKU, 4-min idle timeout
2. Static Standard public IP and /30 IP prefix assigned
3. NAT Gateway associated with PrivateSubnet and PublicSubnet
4. Public IPs via for_each over local.public_ip_definitions
5. Outputs exposed (NAT GW public IP, prefix CIDR)
6. Tags via local.common_tags

## Files to Review

### terraform/natg.tf
```hcl
module "avm_nat_gateway" {
  source  = "Azure/avm-res-network-natgateway/azurerm"
  version = "0.2.1"

  name                    = local.nat_gateway_name
  location                = data.azurerm_resource_group.packer_rg.location
  resource_group_name     = data.azurerm_resource_group.packer_rg.name
  idle_timeout_in_minutes = 4
  sku_name                = "Standard"
  tags                    = local.common_tags
  enable_telemetry        = false
  zones                   = null

  public_ips = {
    "packer_image_natg_pip" = {
      name = local.nat_gateway_pip_name
    }
  }

  public_ip_configuration = {
    allocation_method       = var.nat_gateway_pip_allocation_method
    sku                     = var.nat_gateway_pip_sku
    zones                   = var.nat_gateway_pip_zones
    ddos_protection_mode    = var.nat_gateway_pip_ddos_protection_mode
    idle_timeout_in_minutes = var.nat_gateway_pip_idle_timeout_in_minutes
  }
}

resource "azurerm_nat_gateway_public_ip_prefix_association" "natg_prefix" {
  nat_gateway_id      = module.avm_nat_gateway.resource_id
  public_ip_prefix_id = azurerm_public_ip_prefix.packer-image-natg-ipprefix.id
}
```

### terraform/networking.tf
```hcl
module "virtualnetwork" {
  source  = "Azure/avm-res-network-virtualnetwork/azurerm"
  version = "~> 0.2"

  name                = local.vnet_name
  location            = data.azurerm_resource_group.packer_rg.location
  resource_group_name = data.azurerm_resource_group.packer_rg.name
  address_space       = var.vnet_address_space
  tags                = local.common_tags

  subnets = {
    GatewaySubnet = {
      name             = "GatewaySubnet"
      address_prefixes = var.vnet_subnet_gateway
    }

    AzureBastionSubnet = {
      name             = "AzureBastionSubnet"
      address_prefixes = var.vnet_azure_subnet_bastion
      network_security_group = {
        id = module.bastion_nsg_avm.resource_id
      }
    }

    PublicSubnet = {
      name             = local.subnet_public_name
      address_prefixes = var.vnet_subnet_public
      network_security_group = {
        id = module.public_nsg_avm.resource_id
      }
      nat_gateway = {
        id = module.avm_nat_gateway.resource_id
      }
      service_endpoints = [
        "Microsoft.ContainerRegistry",
        "Microsoft.KeyVault",
        "Microsoft.ServiceBus",
        "Microsoft.Storage"
      ]
    }

    PrivateSubnet = {
      name             = local.subnet_private_name
      address_prefixes = var.vnet_subnet_private
      network_security_group = {
        id = module.private_nsg_avm.resource_id
      }
      nat_gateway = {
        id = module.avm_nat_gateway.resource_id
      }
    }
  }
}
```

### terraform/main.tf
```hcl
resource "azurerm_public_ip_prefix" "packer-image-natg-ipprefix" {
  tags                = local.common_tags
  sku_tier            = "Regional"
  sku                 = "Standard"
  resource_group_name = data.azurerm_resource_group.packer_rg.name
  prefix_length       = var.nat_gateway_pip_prefix_length
  name                = local.nat_gateway_pip_prefix_name
  location            = data.azurerm_resource_group.packer_rg.location
  ip_version          = "IPv4"
}
```

### terraform/public_ips.tf
```hcl
resource "azurerm_public_ip" "pips" {
  for_each = local.public_ip_definitions

  name                    = each.value.name
  resource_group_name     = data.azurerm_resource_group.packer_rg.name
  location                = data.azurerm_resource_group.packer_rg.location
  sku_tier                = "Regional"
  sku                     = "Standard"
  allocation_method       = "Static"
  ip_version              = "IPv4"
  idle_timeout_in_minutes = 4
  ddos_protection_mode    = "VirtualNetworkInherited"
  domain_name_label       = each.value.domain_name_label
  tags                    = each.value.apply_common_tags ? local.common_tags : null
}
```

### terraform/outputs.tf (NAT Gateway section)
```hcl
output "nat_gateway_id" {
  description = "The ID of the AVM NAT Gateway."
  value       = module.avm_nat_gateway.resource_id
}

output "nat_gateway_public_ip_address" {
  description = "The IP address of the Public IP created by the AVM NAT Gateway module."
  value       = module.avm_nat_gateway.public_ip_resource["packer_image_natg_pip"].ip_address
}

output "nat_gateway_public_ip_prefix_value" {
  description = "The CIDR of the Public IP Prefix associated with the NAT Gateway."
  value       = azurerm_public_ip_prefix.packer-image-natg-ipprefix.ip_prefix
}

output "nat_gateway_public_ip_prefix_id" {
  description = "The resource ID of the Public IP Prefix associated with the NAT Gateway."
  value       = azurerm_public_ip_prefix.packer-image-natg-ipprefix.id
}
```

### terraform/locals.tf
```hcl
locals {
  common_tags = {
    CDC                            = "INFRA_SO"
    Account                        = "infraestrutura"
    Application                    = "DevOps"
    ApplicationName                = "Packer Image Builder"
    Applicationversion             = "1.0.0"
    AccessControlContext           = "INFRA_SO"
    AuditRequirement               = "No"
    BusinessUnit                   = "INFRA_SO"
    Compliance                     = "HIPAA"
    Confidentiality                = "PII/PHI"
    CostCenter                     = "15260"
    CreateDate                     = "2023-10-01"
    DataSensitivity                = "PII/PHI"
    DataSubject                    = "INFRA_SO"
    Environment                    = var.environment
    ImageTemplateName              = "it-avd-aib-template-01"
    ImageTemplateResourceGroupName = "rg-hypera-packer-image"
    Infrastructureversion          = "1.0.0"
    Name                           = "DevOps Teams"
    OperatingCostCenter            = "0570025003"
    Owner                          = "INFRA_SO"
    ProjectCostCenter              = "0570025003"
    Projeto                        = "INFRA_SO"
    ProjectCode                    = "HYP-007"
    RetentionPolicy                = "7-years-PHI"
    SecurityContact                = "juliano.barbosa@hypera.com.br"
    Source                         = "terraform-avm-module"
    Team                           = "DevOps"
    Tier                           = "Infrastructure"
    UsedBy                         = "AzureVMImageBuilder"
  }

  public_ip_definitions = {
    "bastion" = {
      name              = local.pip_bastion_name
      domain_name_label = null
      apply_common_tags = true
    }
  }
}
```

### terraform/name.tf (NAT Gateway section)
```hcl
locals {
  nat_gateway_name            = "natg-${var.resource_group_name}-${var.environment}-${var.azure_region_shortcode}"
  nat_gateway_pip_name        = "natg-pip-${var.resource_group_name}-${var.environment}-${var.azure_region_shortcode}"
  nat_gateway_pip_prefix_name = "natg-pip-prefix-${var.resource_group_name}-${var.environment}-${var.azure_region_shortcode}"
}
```

### terraform/variables.tf (NAT Gateway section)
```hcl
variable "nat_gateway_pip_prefix_length" {
  type        = number
  description = "Prefix length for the NAT Gateway Public IP."
  default     = 30
}
variable "nat_gateway_pip_sku" {
  type        = string
  description = "SKU for the NAT Gateway Public IP."
  default     = "Standard"
}
variable "nat_gateway_pip_allocation_method" {
  type        = string
  description = "Allocation method for the NAT Gateway Public IP."
  default     = "Static"
}
variable "nat_gateway_pip_zones" {
  type        = list(string)
  description = "Availability zones for the NAT Gateway Public IP."
  default     = null
  nullable    = true
}
variable "nat_gateway_pip_ddos_protection_mode" {
  type        = string
  description = "DDoS protection mode for the NAT Gateway Public IP."
  default     = "VirtualNetworkInherited"
}
variable "nat_gateway_pip_idle_timeout_in_minutes" {
  type        = number
  description = "Idle timeout in minutes for the NAT Gateway Public IP."
  default     = 4
}
```

### terraform/terraform.tfvars (NAT Gateway section)
```hcl
nat_gateway_pip_prefix_length           = 30
nat_gateway_pip_sku                     = "Standard"
nat_gateway_pip_allocation_method       = "Static"
nat_gateway_pip_zones                   = null
nat_gateway_pip_ddos_protection_mode    = "VirtualNetworkInherited"
nat_gateway_pip_idle_timeout_in_minutes = 30
```

## Previous Review (2026-03-09) Already Fixed
- Dead variables, location inconsistency, PIP idle timeout, unused module.regions, output consolidation, hardcoded prefix_length, hardcoded Environment tag

## Your Review Task
Focus on what the FIRST review MISSED:
1. **Azure Architecture** — Is NAT GW on both public AND private subnets correct? Any Azure-specific gotchas?
2. **Dependency Graph** — Any circular dependencies or missing depends_on?
3. **AVM Module Compatibility** — Does public_ip_configuration match the AVM NAT Gateway module's interface?
4. **State Management** — Destroy/recreate risks? Resource label `packer-image-natg-ipprefix` has hyphens.
5. **Network Design** — Is /30 prefix appropriate? IP exhaustion risks?
6. **Cost** — Any unnecessary cost implications?

Return structured review: CRITICAL, MEDIUM, LOW, INFO severity.
Format: `[SEVERITY] File:Line — Description`

input.name: Copilot-Reviewer
input.prompt:
You are acting as **GitHub Copilot** performing an adversarial code review of Terraform code for Story 1-3: Deploy NAT Gateway and Public IP Resources.

**Your review persona:** GitHub Copilot — pattern-focused, excels at catching code quality issues, inconsistencies between files, missing validations, and DRY violations.

## Story Context
Story 1-3 deploys a NAT Gateway with static public IP for an Azure Virtual Desktop golden image project. Uses AVM modules. Associates with PrivateSubnet and PublicSubnet.

## Acceptance Criteria
1. NAT Gateway provisioned using AVM module v0.2.1 with Standard SKU, 4-min idle timeout
2. Static Standard public IP and /30 IP prefix assigned
3. NAT Gateway associated with PrivateSubnet and PublicSubnet
4. Public IPs via for_each over local.public_ip_definitions
5. Outputs exposed (NAT GW public IP, prefix CIDR)
6. Tags via local.common_tags

## Files to Review

### terraform/natg.tf
```hcl
module "avm_nat_gateway" {
  source  = "Azure/avm-res-network-natgateway/azurerm"
  version = "0.2.1"
  name                    = local.nat_gateway_name
  location                = data.azurerm_resource_group.packer_rg.location
  resource_group_name     = data.azurerm_resource_group.packer_rg.name
  idle_timeout_in_minutes = 4
  sku_name                = "Standard"
  tags                    = local.common_tags
  enable_telemetry        = false
  zones                   = null
  public_ips = {
    "packer_image_natg_pip" = {
      name = local.nat_gateway_pip_name
    }
  }
  public_ip_configuration = {
    allocation_method       = var.nat_gateway_pip_allocation_method
    sku                     = var.nat_gateway_pip_sku
    zones                   = var.nat_gateway_pip_zones
    ddos_protection_mode    = var.nat_gateway_pip_ddos_protection_mode
    idle_timeout_in_minutes = var.nat_gateway_pip_idle_timeout_in_minutes
  }
}

resource "azurerm_nat_gateway_public_ip_prefix_association" "natg_prefix" {
  nat_gateway_id      = module.avm_nat_gateway.resource_id
  public_ip_prefix_id = azurerm_public_ip_prefix.packer-image-natg-ipprefix.id
}
```

### terraform/public_ips.tf
```hcl
resource "azurerm_public_ip" "pips" {
  for_each = local.public_ip_definitions
  name                    = each.value.name
  resource_group_name     = data.azurerm_resource_group.packer_rg.name
  location                = data.azurerm_resource_group.packer_rg.location
  sku_tier                = "Regional"
  sku                     = "Standard"
  allocation_method       = "Static"
  ip_version              = "IPv4"
  idle_timeout_in_minutes = 4
  ddos_protection_mode    = "VirtualNetworkInherited"
  domain_name_label       = each.value.domain_name_label
  tags                    = each.value.apply_common_tags ? local.common_tags : null
}
```

### terraform/main.tf
```hcl
resource "azurerm_public_ip_prefix" "packer-image-natg-ipprefix" {
  tags                = local.common_tags
  sku_tier            = "Regional"
  sku                 = "Standard"
  resource_group_name = data.azurerm_resource_group.packer_rg.name
  prefix_length       = var.nat_gateway_pip_prefix_length
  name                = local.nat_gateway_pip_prefix_name
  location            = data.azurerm_resource_group.packer_rg.location
  ip_version          = "IPv4"
}
```

### terraform/outputs.tf (NAT GW section)
```hcl
output "nat_gateway_id" {
  description = "The ID of the AVM NAT Gateway."
  value       = module.avm_nat_gateway.resource_id
}
output "nat_gateway_public_ip_address" {
  description = "The IP address of the Public IP created by the AVM NAT Gateway module."
  value       = module.avm_nat_gateway.public_ip_resource["packer_image_natg_pip"].ip_address
}
output "nat_gateway_public_ip_prefix_value" {
  description = "The CIDR of the Public IP Prefix associated with the NAT Gateway."
  value       = azurerm_public_ip_prefix.packer-image-natg-ipprefix.ip_prefix
}
output "nat_gateway_public_ip_prefix_id" {
  description = "The resource ID of the Public IP Prefix associated with the NAT Gateway."
  value       = azurerm_public_ip_prefix.packer-image-natg-ipprefix.id
}
```

### terraform/networking.tf (subnet associations)
```hcl
PublicSubnet = {
  name             = local.subnet_public_name
  address_prefixes = var.vnet_subnet_public
  network_security_group = { id = module.public_nsg_avm.resource_id }
  nat_gateway = { id = module.avm_nat_gateway.resource_id }
  service_endpoints = ["Microsoft.ContainerRegistry","Microsoft.KeyVault","Microsoft.ServiceBus","Microsoft.Storage"]
}
PrivateSubnet = {
  name             = local.subnet_private_name
  address_prefixes = var.vnet_subnet_private
  network_security_group = { id = module.private_nsg_avm.resource_id }
  nat_gateway = { id = module.avm_nat_gateway.resource_id }
}
```

### terraform/variables.tf + terraform.tfvars (NAT GW vars)
- `nat_gateway_pip_prefix_length` = 30
- `nat_gateway_pip_sku` = "Standard"
- `nat_gateway_pip_allocation_method` = "Static"
- `nat_gateway_pip_zones` = null
- `nat_gateway_pip_ddos_protection_mode` = "VirtualNetworkInherited"
- `nat_gateway_pip_idle_timeout_in_minutes` = default 4 in variables.tf, overridden to 30 in tfvars

### terraform/locals.tf
- `public_ip_definitions` has only "bastion" entry with hardcoded `idle_timeout_in_minutes = 4` in public_ips.tf
- `common_tags` uses `var.environment` (good)

## Previous Review Already Fixed
- Dead variables, location inconsistency, PIP idle timeout, unused module, output consolidation, hardcoded values

## Your Review Task
Focus on PATTERN CONSISTENCY and CODE QUALITY:
1. **DRY violations** — Are values hardcoded in public_ips.tf that should use variables? (idle_timeout=4, sku="Standard", etc.)
2. **Variable validation** — Missing validation blocks on constrained variables?
3. **Inconsistency** — NAT GW PIP uses variables for everything but bastion PIP hardcodes values
4. **Output completeness** — Any missing outputs the story requires?
5. **Type safety** — Are variable types appropriate?
6. **Documentation** — Missing or misleading descriptions?

Return structured review: CRITICAL, MEDIUM, LOW, INFO severity.
Format: `[SEVERITY] File:Line — Description`

input.name: Grok-Reviewer
input.prompt:
You are acting as **xAI Grok** performing an adversarial code review of Terraform code for Story 1-3: Deploy NAT Gateway and Public IP Resources.

**Your review persona:** Grok — contrarian, security-focused, excels at finding edge cases, security vulnerabilities, operational risks, and questioning assumptions others accept.

## Story Context
Story 1-3 deploys a NAT Gateway with static public IP for an Azure Virtual Desktop golden image project. Uses AVM modules. Associates with PrivateSubnet and PublicSubnet.

## Acceptance Criteria
1. NAT Gateway provisioned using AVM module v0.2.1 with Standard SKU, 4-min idle timeout
2. Static Standard public IP and /30 IP prefix assigned
3. NAT Gateway associated with PrivateSubnet and PublicSubnet
4. Public IPs via for_each over local.public_ip_definitions
5. Outputs exposed (NAT GW public IP, prefix CIDR)
6. Tags via local.common_tags

## Files to Review

### terraform/natg.tf
```hcl
module "avm_nat_gateway" {
  source  = "Azure/avm-res-network-natgateway/azurerm"
  version = "0.2.1"
  name                    = local.nat_gateway_name
  location                = data.azurerm_resource_group.packer_rg.location
  resource_group_name     = data.azurerm_resource_group.packer_rg.name
  idle_timeout_in_minutes = 4
  sku_name                = "Standard"
  tags                    = local.common_tags
  enable_telemetry        = false
  zones                   = null
  public_ips = {
    "packer_image_natg_pip" = {
      name = local.nat_gateway_pip_name
    }
  }
  public_ip_configuration = {
    allocation_method       = var.nat_gateway_pip_allocation_method
    sku                     = var.nat_gateway_pip_sku
    zones                   = var.nat_gateway_pip_zones
    ddos_protection_mode    = var.nat_gateway_pip_ddos_protection_mode
    idle_timeout_in_minutes = var.nat_gateway_pip_idle_timeout_in_minutes
  }
}

resource "azurerm_nat_gateway_public_ip_prefix_association" "natg_prefix" {
  nat_gateway_id      = module.avm_nat_gateway.resource_id
  public_ip_prefix_id = azurerm_public_ip_prefix.packer-image-natg-ipprefix.id
}
```

### terraform/networking.tf (subnet associations)
```hcl
PublicSubnet = {
  name             = local.subnet_public_name
  address_prefixes = var.vnet_subnet_public
  network_security_group = { id = module.public_nsg_avm.resource_id }
  nat_gateway = { id = module.avm_nat_gateway.resource_id }
  service_endpoints = ["Microsoft.ContainerRegistry","Microsoft.KeyVault","Microsoft.ServiceBus","Microsoft.Storage"]
}
PrivateSubnet = {
  name             = local.subnet_private_name
  address_prefixes = var.vnet_subnet_private
  network_security_group = { id = module.private_nsg_avm.resource_id }
  nat_gateway = { id = module.avm_nat_gateway.resource_id }
}
```

### terraform/main.tf
```hcl
resource "azurerm_public_ip_prefix" "packer-image-natg-ipprefix" {
  tags                = local.common_tags
  sku_tier            = "Regional"
  sku                 = "Standard"
  resource_group_name = data.azurerm_resource_group.packer_rg.name
  prefix_length       = var.nat_gateway_pip_prefix_length
  name                = local.nat_gateway_pip_prefix_name
  location            = data.azurerm_resource_group.packer_rg.location
  ip_version          = "IPv4"
}
```

### terraform/public_ips.tf
```hcl
resource "azurerm_public_ip" "pips" {
  for_each = local.public_ip_definitions
  name                    = each.value.name
  resource_group_name     = data.azurerm_resource_group.packer_rg.name
  location                = data.azurerm_resource_group.packer_rg.location
  sku_tier                = "Regional"
  sku                     = "Standard"
  allocation_method       = "Static"
  ip_version              = "IPv4"
  idle_timeout_in_minutes = 4
  ddos_protection_mode    = "VirtualNetworkInherited"
  domain_name_label       = each.value.domain_name_label
  tags                    = each.value.apply_common_tags ? local.common_tags : null
}
```

### terraform/outputs.tf (NAT GW section)
```hcl
output "nat_gateway_id" { value = module.avm_nat_gateway.resource_id }
output "nat_gateway_public_ip_address" { value = module.avm_nat_gateway.public_ip_resource["packer_image_natg_pip"].ip_address }
output "nat_gateway_public_ip_prefix_value" { value = azurerm_public_ip_prefix.packer-image-natg-ipprefix.ip_prefix }
output "nat_gateway_public_ip_prefix_id" { value = azurerm_public_ip_prefix.packer-image-natg-ipprefix.id }
```

### terraform/locals.tf
```hcl
locals {
  common_tags = {
    # ... many tags ...
    SecurityContact = "juliano.barbosa@hypera.com.br"
    Compliance      = "HIPAA"
    Confidentiality = "PII/PHI"
    RetentionPolicy = "7-years-PHI"
    # ...
  }
  public_ip_definitions = {
    "bastion" = {
      name              = local.pip_bastion_name
      domain_name_label = null
      apply_common_tags = true
    }
  }
}
```

### terraform/terraform.tfvars
```hcl
nat_gateway_pip_idle_timeout_in_minutes = 30
# Also contains:
msteams_channel              = "https://hypermarcas.webhook.office.com/webhookb2/..."
boot_diagnostics_storage_uri = "https://stgdevopsapps.blob.core.windows.net/boot-log"
custom_image_id = "/subscriptions/e214e4b4-b890-4b78-8e54-6b32b80acc77/resourceGroups/packer_rg/providers/Microsoft.Compute/images/..."
hypera_cidr_ips (in variables.tf) has corporate IPs hardcoded as defaults
```

## Previous Review Already Fixed
- Dead variables, location inconsistency, PIP idle timeout, unused module, output consolidation

## Your Review Task — SECURITY AND OPERATIONAL FOCUS
1. **Sensitive data exposure** — Are subscription IDs, webhook URLs, email addresses committed to repo? Should they be in tfvars (which is committed)?
2. **NAT Gateway security** — With NAT GW on both subnets, what's the blast radius if compromised?
3. **DDoS protection** — Is "VirtualNetworkInherited" sufficient for public-facing IPs?
4. **IP prefix /30** — Only 4 IPs (2 usable). Is this enough for SNAT port exhaustion protection?
5. **Zones = null** — No zone redundancy for NAT GW or PIPs. Single zone failure takes down all outbound.
6. **Output sensitivity** — Should `nat_gateway_public_ip_address` be marked sensitive?
7. **Tags** — HIPAA compliance tag but is the infra actually HIPAA-compliant?
8. **Operational** — What happens during NAT GW maintenance? Failover plan?

Be contrarian. Question assumptions. Flag real operational and security risks.

Return structured review: CRITICAL, MEDIUM, LOW, INFO severity.
Format: `[SEVERITY] File:Line — Description`
